message:
🐛 Guard against undefined fields in Mission Browser filters (#1556)

Community-sourced missions can have undefined type, title, description,
or tags fields when validation fails but data is still used. Add null
guards to all toLowerCase() and .some() calls in the filter logic, facet
computation, and matcher to prevent TypeError crashes.

Also harden normalizeMission() to ensure required fields have defaults
when the flat MissionExport path is taken.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
